skills.title: Excel & Spreadsheet Processing
skills.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization.
skills.description_zh: 强大的电子表格处理 Skill，支持创建、编辑和分析 .xlsx、.csv 等格式文件，涵盖公式计算、数据可视化和批量自动化处理。

skills.title: PDF Manipulation Toolkit
skills.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms.
skills.description_zh: 完整的 PDF 处理工具集，支持文本与表格提取、新建 PDF、合并/拆分文档、填充表单，以及编程化批量处理与分析。

skills.title: Web Search & Research
skills.description: Search the web using Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, and Baidu without API keys. Perfect for real-time information retrieval.
skills.description_zh: 无需 API Key，通过 Google、Bing、DuckDuckGo、百度等搜索引擎实时检索网络信息，适用于事实核查、新闻查询、技术文档搜索等场景。

skills.title: Web Article Reader
skills.description: Extract and summarize content from any website, article, documentation, GitHub repos, and forum threads with intelligent parsing.
skills.description_zh: 智能解析并提取任意网页的可读内容，支持文章、技术文档、GitHub 仓库、论坛帖子等，自动摘要与全文提取兼备。

skills.title: Word Document Creator
skills.description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, and formatting preservation.
skills.description_zh: 全面的 Word 文档处理能力，支持新建文档、修订跟踪、批注管理、格式保留，以及内容提取与结构化分析。

skills.title: Presentation Builder
skills.description: Presentation creation, editing, and analysis with support for layouts, speaker notes, and dynamic content generation.
skills.description_zh: 支持创建、编辑和分析 .pptx 演示文稿，涵盖布局配置、演讲者备注、动态内容生成，以及对已有文件的修改与结构化解析。

skills.title: Self-Improving Agent
skills.description: Captures learnings, errors, and corrections to enable continuous improvement through systematic feedback loops.
skills.description_zh: 持续捕获学习成果、错误记录与用户纠正，通过系统化反馈循环让 Agent 不断自我优化，适合需要长期持续改进的工作流。

skills.title: Environment Auto-Setup
skills.description: Auto-detect and install missing tools and dependencies for macOS (Homebrew) and Linux (apt/yum) environments.
skills.description_zh: 自动检测并安装缺失的工具与依赖，兼容 macOS（Homebrew）和 Linux（apt/yum），让开发环境一键就绪。

skills.title: Browser Automation with Playwright
skills.description: Model-invoked browser automation skill enabling Claude to autonomously write and execute custom automation scripts for testing and validation.
skills.description_zh: 由模型调用的浏览器自动化 Skill，让 Claude 能够自主编写并执行自定义自动化脚本，覆盖 UI 测试、表单填充、数据采集和功能验证等场景。

skills.title: API Testing & Debugging
skills.description: Comprehensive API testing and debugging skill for automated API validation, performance testing, and request inspection.
skills.description_zh: 全面的 API 测试与调试 Skill，支持自动化接口验证、性能测试、请求检查与响应分析，帮助快速定位和修复 API 问题。

skills.title: Video Clipping & Editing
skills.description: Automated video clipping, editing, and processing skill for creating highlights, extracting segments, and generating video content.
skills.description_zh: 自动化视频剪辑、编辑与处理 Skill，支持高光片段生成、指定区间提取、批量视频内容生成，适用于短视频创作和内容运营场景。
